name: student-validation-backend
description: Spring Boot 4.x / Java 21 development plugin for the student-validation-api repo.

commands.name: write-service
commands.description: Generate a Spring Boot service skeleton (interface + impl, constructor injection, validation, exceptions).

commands.name: write-integration-test
commands.description: Generate a @DataJpaTest + Testcontainers PostgreSQL repository test template.

agents.name: CodeReviewer
agents.description: Reviews code for Clean Architecture, SOLID, DTO/Entity separation, MapStruct usage, and test quality.

hooks.description: Run ./mvnw test and block commit on failure.
